message:
feat(abi): expand ctype locale variants, wchar ops, and harden stdlib/unistd implementations

Continued ABI surface expansion and implementation hardening:

- ctype_abi.rs: Add locale-aware _l suffixed character classification
  functions (isalpha_l, toupper_l, etc.) and wctype.h wide character
  classification stubs (+178 lines)
- wchar_abi.rs: Add wide character I/O functions (fgetwc, fputwc,
  getwchar, putwchar, ungetwc) and wide string formatting (swprintf,
  vswprintf) (+82 lines)
- pwd_abi.rs: Refine shadow password parsing edge cases and error
  handling
- stdlib_abi.rs: Expand environment and conversion functions with
  improved error paths
- string_abi.rs: Tighten wide string operation bounds checking
- unistd_abi.rs: Refine filesystem operation error propagation
- fragmentation_storms_test.rs: Expand storm scenarios with additional
  concurrent allocation patterns
- check_healing_oracle.sh: Improve script robustness
- support_matrix.json: Update coverage metrics
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,19 @@ RUN_CMD=(cargo run -p frankenlibc-harness --bin harness -- verify-membrane
 )
 
 if command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-  rch exec -- "${RUN_CMD[@]}" --output "${CURRENT}" --log "${LOG}" >/dev/null
+  cat <<'EOS' | rch exec -- bash -s > "${CURRENT}"
+set -euo pipefail
+tmp_current="$(mktemp)"
+tmp_log="$(mktemp)"
+cargo run -p frankenlibc-harness --bin harness -- verify-membrane \
+  --mode both \
+  --campaign healing_oracle \
+  --fail-on-mismatch \
+  --output "${tmp_current}" \
+  --log "${tmp_log}" >/dev/null
+cat "${tmp_current}"
+EOS
+  printf '%s\n' '{"event":"healing_oracle.remote_log_not_copied"}' > "${LOG}"
 else
   echo "WARN: rch not found; running local cargo fallback" >&2
   "${RUN_CMD[@]}" --output "${CURRENT}" --log "${LOG}" >/dev/null
